{{Quote|Attention! This is Captain Kursk Mal'ia of the New Republic Navy. This system is claimed by the Bothan Worlds in the name of the New Republic!|Kursk Mal'ia|<ref name="Endgame">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Endgame (adventure)|book=Endgame}}</ref>}}
'''Kursk Mal'ia''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] naval officer serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], noted as both a combat commander and a military analyst.

==Biography==
Apparently in the first years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was responsible for compiling a "vessel recognition chart", possibly designed for use in conjunction with [[Ral'Rai Muvunc]]'s program of recruiting [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Pirates & Privateers">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>

By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he held the rank of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]], and he was commanding of the [[Bothan Combat Response Element]] from his flagship ''[[Boash'ua]]''. Assigned to support the mission of the ''[[FarStar]]'' against [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] of [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]], Mal'ia and his task force made their appearance during the [[Battle of Kathol System]], where they played a vital role in defeating the Imperial forces. Although suffering severe damage, they destroyed the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Titania]]'', and seriously damaged her sister-ship [[Raptor (Star Destroyer)|''Raptor'']].<ref name="Endgame" />

By the end of [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Mal'ia had been promoted to [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]], and transferred to the [[Tactical Analysis Bureau]], in which capacity he now began to supply [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] with information on [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] for ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'', including the [[TIE/rpt starfighter]] and [[Y-4 Transport|Y-4 transport]] used by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], and the [[Hapan Battle Dragon|Battle Dragon]] and other ships of the [[Hapan Royal Navy]], as well as specific biographies of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] flagship ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' and the Hapan [[Queen Mother]]s' "Custom-built Royal Conveyance", ''[[Star Home]]''.<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref>

By [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] he had reached the rank of [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]], and provided NRI with extensive reports on the [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] ships and other New Republic designs. Before the end of [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], however, he had retired from the Navy with the rank of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]], but he continued to provide naval information for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] of NRI, with whom he seems to have developed a friendship over the years. For the [[Corellian Crisis]], his contributions were detailed dossiers about the [[Intruder (Namana-class)|''Intruder'']] and the three [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class Destroyers]], the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Light Attack Fighter Model 250|LAF-250]] and [[Heavy/Light Attack Fighter 500|HLAF-500]] starfighter designs and [[Mynock-class assault boat|''Mynock''-class assault boat]], [[X-TIE Fighter]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] of [[Ugly/Legends|uglies]], and specific information on the ''[[Jade's Fire]]'', the ''[[Naritus]]'', and the prototype [[Selonian cone ship|Coneship]] built by the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonians]].<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kursk Mal'ia first appeared in [[West End Games]]' "[[Endgame (adventure)|Endgame]]" supplement.<ref name="Endgame" /> In ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' he was the in-universe author of the New Class files.<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" />
